nodes.title: Simulated Annealing: From Physics to Optimization
nodes.excerpt: Introduction The idea of Simulated Annealing (SA) has always fascinated me. I first heard about annealing in physics classes, then later saw…
nodes.description: Exploring the mathematical foundations of Simulated Annealing, showing how it emerges from fundamental principles of statistical mechanics and how theoretical results guarantee its convergence under certain conditions.

nodes.title: Simulated Annealing: Ising Model Project
nodes.excerpt: Note: The math behind the acceptance rule and cooling is in the companion post: Simulated Annealing: From Physics to Optimization. Project…
nodes.description: Hands-on Ising model + Metropolis validation, then simulated annealing in 3D: local energy updates, periodic boundaries, and checking physics before trusting the optimizer.
